title: sparganium stoloniferum subsp. stoloniferum
intro: Sparganium stoloniferum subsp. stoloniferum, also known as Bur-reed or Stoloniferous Spatterdock, is a perennial aquatic plant that belongs to the family Sparganiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Sparganium stoloniferum subsp. stoloniferum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various health issues.
